category_sources: Official documentation page https://www.mltframework.org/docs/ identifies MLT documentation for users, plugins, and developers.
source_facts.description says MLT is used to author, manage, and run multitrack audio/video compositions.
display_name_sources: Official site https://www.mltframework.org/ and documentation page style the project name as MLT.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official MLT Framework site and https://www.mltframework.org/docs/ is its official documentation page.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated in the input, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies multitrack audio/video composition functionality.
source_facts.executables lists melt and melt-7 command-line tools.
